title: lathyrus laevigatus subsp. grandiflorus
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. grandiflorus, also known as the large-flowered yellow pea or large-flowered smooth pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial legume that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation due to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. grandiflorus include its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
